---
output:
  word_document: 
    reference_docx: "../data/arboreport_template.docx"
params:
  biodata_row: NULL
  resized_photos_dir: NULL
  photo_prefix: NULL
  incl_crown_spread: NULL
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r summary table, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.retina = .25)

tag_id <- biodata_row$Tree.ID
girth <- biodata_row$Girth..spread..m.
height <- biodata_row$Height..m.
insp_date <- as.character(biodata_row$Date)
site <- biodata_row$Site
habit <- biodata_row$Habit
species <- biodata_row$Species

if (grepl("var\\.|subsp\\.|spp\\.|cf\\.", species)) {

  # Find if its var. subsp. spp. or cf.
  if (grepl("var\\.", species)){
    
    split <- strsplit(species, " var\\. ")[[1]]
    species_full <- paste0("*", split[1], "* var. *", split[2], "*")
    
  } else if (grepl("subsp\\.", species)){
    
    split <- strsplit(species, " subsp\\. ")[[1]]
    species_full <- paste0("*", split[1], "* subsp. *", split[2], "*")
    
  } else if (grepl("spp\\.", species)){
    
    split <- strsplit(species, " spp\\. ")[[1]]
    species_full <- paste0("*", split[1], "* spp. *", split[2], "*")
    
  } else {
    
    if (str_detect(species, " cf\\. ")){ #cf. in the middle of genus and species
      split <- strsplit(species, " cf\\. ")[[1]]
      species_full <- paste0("*", split[1], "* cf. *", split[2], "*")
    } else { #starts with cf.
      species_full <- paste0(str_replace(species, "cf\\. ", "cf. *"), "*")
    }
  }
  
} else if (grepl("unknown|not on site|others|vegetation", tolower(species))) {
  species_full <-  species
} else {
  species_full <-  paste0("*", species, "*")
}

if (incl_crown_spread){
  crownspread <- biodata_row$Crown.Spread
  if (is.na(habit)) {
    df <- data.frame(V1 = c("**Tag ID:**","**Girth (m):**","**Crown Spread (m):**","**Insp date:**"),
                     V2 = c(tag_id, girth, crownspread, insp_date),
                     V3 = c("**Species:**", "**Height (m):**", "", "**Site:**"),
                     V4 = c(species_full, height, "", site))
  } else if (habit == "Strangler"){ 
    ## Use Spread instead of Girth for stranglers
    df <- data.frame(V1 = c("**Tag ID:**","**Spread (m):**","**Crown Spread (m):**","**Insp date:**"),
                     V2 = c(tag_id, girth, crownspread, insp_date),
                     V3 = c("**Species:**", "**Height (m):**", "", "**Site:**"),
                     V4 = c(species_full, height, "", site))
  } else {
    df <- data.frame(V1 = c("**Tag ID:**","**Girth (m):**","**Crown Spread (m):**","**Insp date:**"),
                     V2 = c(tag_id, girth, crownspread, insp_date),
                     V3 = c("**Species:**", "**Height (m):**", "", "**Site:**"),
                     V4 = c(species_full, height, "", site))
  }
  
} else {
  if (is.na(habit)){
    df <- data.frame(V1 = c("**Tag ID:**","**Girth (m):**","**Insp date:**"),
                 V2 = c(tag_id, girth, insp_date),
                 V3 = c("**Species:**", "**Height (m):**", "**Site:**"),
                 V4 = c(species_full, height, site))
  } else if (habit == "Strangler"){
    ## Use Spread instead of Girth for stranglers
    df <- data.frame(V1 = c("**Tag ID:**","**Spread (m):**","**Insp date:**"),
                     V2 = c(tag_id, girth, insp_date),
                     V3 = c("**Species:**", "**Height (m):**", "**Site:**"),
                     V4 = c(species_full, height, site))
  } else {
    df <- data.frame(V1 = c("**Tag ID:**","**Girth (m):**","**Insp date:**"),
                     V2 = c(tag_id, girth, insp_date),
                     V3 = c("**Species:**", "**Height (m):**", "**Site:**"),
                     V4 = c(species_full, height, site))
  }
}

```

## Assessment for Tree `r tag_id`  

```{r, echo = F, results='asis'}
knitr::kable(df, col.names = NULL)
```


### Observations

```{r observations, echo = F, results='asis'}

## Line for tree health
health <- tolower(biodata_row$Health)
if (is_empty(health) | any(is.na(health))) {
  health_line <- NA
} else{
  health_line <- paste("Tree displays", health, "physiological health and vigor")
}

## Line for tree form
form <- tolower(biodata_row$Form)
if (is_empty(form) | any(is.na(form))) {
  form_line <- NA
} else{
  form_line <- paste("Tree has", form, "form")
}

## Line for crown form
crown_form <- tolower(biodata_row$Crown.form)
if (crown_form == "" | is.na(crown_form)) {
  crown_line <- NA
} else {
  crown_line <- paste("Crown form is/has", crown_form)
}

## Line for tree lean
lean_raw <- biodata_row$Lean 

if (is_empty(lean_raw) | is.na(lean_raw)) {
  lean_line = NA
} else {
  lean <- unlist(strsplit(tolower(lean_raw), ","))
  
  # Is the trunk leaning or bowing
  if (any(lean %in% "bow")) {
    lean_or_bow = " bow" 
  } else lean_or_bow = " lean"
  
  # Is there self-correction
  if (any(lean %in% "self-corrected")) {
    self_corrected = " self-corrected" 
  } else self_corrected = ""
    
  # Degree of lean or bow
  degree_num <- unlist(regmatches(lean, gregexpr("[[:digit:]]+", lean)))
  if (is_empty(degree_num)) degree = "" else {
    degree = paste0(" ", degree_num, " degree")
  }
  
  # Is the lean/bow acute (more than 45 degrees)
  if (any(lean %in% "acute")) {
    acute = " acute" 
  } else acute = ""
  
  # What is the direction of the lean/bow
  directions <- c("north", "south", "east", "west", 
                  "northeast", "northwest", "southeast", "southwest")
  direction_idx <- which(directions %in% lean)
  if (is_empty(direction_idx)) direction = "" else {
    direction = paste0(" towards ", directions[direction_idx])
  }
  
  lean_line <- paste0("Trunk has a", degree, self_corrected, acute, lean_or_bow, direction)
}

## Lines from observation column
arbo_phrases <- read.csv("../data/Arboriculture_phrases_to_automate.csv")

obs <- unlist(strsplit(biodata_row$Observation, ","))

new_obs <- data.frame(obs=obs) %>%
  merge(arbo_phrases, by.x = "obs", by.y = "Raw.data.assessment", all.x = T) %>%
  mutate(new_obs = case_when(is.na(Automated.report.phrasing) ~ obs, 
                             .default = Automated.report.phrasing)) %>%
  pull(new_obs)

if (any(new_obs %in% "U-shape bifurcation") & 
    any(new_obs %in% "Co-dominant stems")) {
  
  updated_obs <- new_obs[!new_obs %in% c("U-shape bifurcation","Co-dominant stems")]
  updated_obs <- c(updated_obs, "Co-dominant stems with U-shape bifurcation")
  
} else if (any(new_obs %in% "V-shape bifurcation") & 
           any(new_obs%in%"Co-dominant stems")) {
  
  updated_obs <- new_obs[!new_obs %in% c("V-shape bifurcation","Co-dominant stems")]
  updated_obs <- c(updated_obs, "Co-dominant stems with V-shape bifurcation")
  
} else updated_obs <- new_obs

observation_lines <- sort(updated_obs)

## Lines from other observation column
other_observation_lines <- unlist(strsplit(biodata_row$Other.observations, ";"))

## Combining all the different lines
all_lines <- na.omit(c(health_line, form_line, crown_line, lean_line, observation_lines,
                       other_observation_lines))

if (all(is.na(all_lines))) {
  cat(paste0("1. No observations."))
} else cat(paste0("1. ", all_lines, "."), sep = "\n")


```

### Photos
```{r photos, echo=FALSE, error = FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="300px", out.width="300px", results='asis'}

if (!is.null(resized_photos_dir)){
  photo_by <- trimws(biodata_row$Photos.by)
  photo_num_input <- trimws(biodata_row$Photo.no.)
  
  if (is.na(photo_num_input)) cat("No photos available.") else {
    
    photo_nums <- unlist(strsplit(photo_num_input, ",|;|; |, "))

    photo_nums_all <- c()
    for (photo_num in photo_nums) {
      if (grepl(photo_num, pattern = "-")) {
        photo_from <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(photo_num, "-"))[1])
        photo_to <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(photo_num, "-"))[2])

        ## Fill in missing digits if applicable
        photo_from_digits <- nchar(photo_from)
        photo_to_digits <- nchar(photo_to)

        if (photo_from_digits != photo_to_digits) {
          num_missing_digits <- photo_from_digits - photo_to_digits
          missing_digits <- substr(photo_from, 1, num_missing_digits)
          photo_to <- paste0(missing_digits, photo_to)
        }

        photo_range <- seq(as.integer(photo_from), as.integer(photo_to))

        photo_nums_all <- as.integer(c(photo_nums_all, photo_range))
      } else {
        photo_nums_all <- as.integer(c(photo_nums_all, photo_num))
      }
    }

    photo_folder <- paste(photo_prefix, as.character(insp_date), photo_by,
                          sep = "_")
    photo_folder_resized <- file.path(resized_photos_dir, photo_folder)

    photo_all <- list.files(photo_folder_resized)
    photo_pattern <- paste(sprintf("%04d", photo_nums_all), collapse = "|")
    photo_names <- grep(photo_pattern, photo_all, value = T)
    photo_paths <- file.path(photo_folder_resized, photo_names)
    
    if (is_empty(photo_names)){
      photo_paths = paste0(photo_paths, ":", tag_id)
    }
    
    photo_paths_group <- rep(seq(1, length(photo_paths), 2),
                             each = 2, length.out = length(photo_paths))
    photo_paths_splits <- split(photo_paths, as.factor(photo_paths_group))
    
    tryCatch({
      for (photo_paths_split in photo_paths_splits){
        cat("\n")
        for (photo_path in photo_paths_split){
          cat(paste0("![](", photo_path,"){width=50%}"))
        }
        # photo_paths_split = unlist(photo_paths_split)
        # print(photo_paths_split)
        # knitr::include_graphics(photo_paths_split, error = T)
        cat("  \n")
      }
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Error: photos could not be found\n")
    })
  }
}
```

### Assessment

```{r assessment, echo = F, results='asis'}
## Lines for conservation significance
origin <- biodata_row$Origin
status <- biodata_row$Status
origin_line <- paste0("Species origin and status: ", origin, ", ", status)

## Lines for storm-vulnerable species 
storm_vul_spp <- c("Falcataria falcata", "Spathodea campanulata", "Acacia auriculiformis")

if (any(species %in% storm_vul_spp)){
  
  storm_line <- "This species is storm-vulnerable with shallow rooting. There is a high likelihood of uprooting during strong winds and/or heavy rain."
  
} else storm_line <- NA

## Lines for rating 
sule <- biodata_row$SULE.Rating
treeAZ <- biodata_row$Tree.AZ.Rating
retention_val <- biodata_row$Retention.Value
add_assessment <- biodata_row$Additional.assessment

rating_line=paste0("Referring to SULE (Annex A) and TreeAZ (Annex B) tables, the tree is under ", 
                   "the following categories of **", retention_val, "** retention value:")

rating_scores <- c(paste0("SULE rating: ", sule), paste0("TreeAZ rating: ", treeAZ))

## Combining all lines
assessment_vec <- na.omit(c(origin_line, storm_line, add_assessment, rating_line))

cat(paste0("1. ", assessment_vec), sep = "\n")
cat(paste0("    - ", rating_scores), sep = "\n")

```

### Recommendations

```{r recommendations, echo = F, results='asis'}
rec <- unlist(strsplit(biodata_row$Recommendation, ",|;|; |, "))
construction <- biodata_row$Affected.by.construction

if (tolower(species) %in% "not on site/dead"){
  rec_line = "No recommendations."
} else if (retention_val %in% "low" | tolower(construction) %in% "yes"){
  rec_line = "Tree may not be retained on site."
} else if (is_empty(rec) | any(is.na(rec))){
  rec_line = "No recommendations."
} else rec_line = rec

cat(paste0("1. ", rec_line), sep = "\n")

```
